tweaks.name: Hide Dock
tweaks.description: Hides the dock background on the home screen. Also hides app icons in the dock — move them to the home screen grid before applying. Respring to restore.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Hide Home Bar
tweaks.description: Hides the bottom home indicator. Respring after applying so SpringBoard refreshes the asset cache.
tweaks.author: zeroxjf

tweaks.name: Dock Color
tweaks.description: Colors the dock background with a custom color. Works on iOS 26 and earlier.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Hide Search Pill
tweaks.description: Hides the search pill on the home screen.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Floating Icons
tweaks.description: Adds gentle floating animations to home-screen and dock icons. Configurable movement, rotation, and scale.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Dump Views
tweaks.description: Diagnostic tool that dumps visible SpringBoard view trees to /tmp.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16
